title: The Virgin of Stamboul
writer: Tod Browning, William Parker, H.H. Van Loan
actors: Priscilla Dean, Wheeler Oakman, Wallace Beery
plot: Achmet Bey, a Turkish chieftain, catches one of his many wives in adultery and murders her lover. Throwing aside the cuckolding wife, he abducts his harem an innocent girl. However, a brave American who loves her comes to her rescue.
